body:
## Rationale

Dirk Verbeuren is Megadeth's current drummer (joined 2016 after Chris Adler's departure). He has a profile page on MetalForge and a `whats-in-dirk-verbeurens-kit.md` article, but **zero album-specific editorial content**.

'Dystopia' (2016) won the **Grammy Award for Best Metal Performance** — it's the most commercially and critically successful Megadeth album in decades. High search intent: fans actively research this album's recording and Verbeuren's kit.

MetalForge already has a Megadeth content cluster (`rust-in-peace-drum-setup.md` for Nick Menza). A Verbeuren article completes the Megadeth timeline: Gar Samuelson → Nick Menza → Chris Broderick → Dirk Verbeuren.

**Confirmed absent from `albumArticles.js`:** `dirk-verbeuren-drum-setup`, `dystopia-drum-setup` — neither slug exists.

**Search targets:**
- "dirk verbeuren megadeth drum setup"
- "dystopia megadeth drummer"
- "dirk verbeuren kit" / "dirk verbeuren gear"

## Content shape (≥400 words)

```js
{
  slug: 'dystopia-drum-setup',
  drummerSlug: 'dirk-verbeuren',
  title: "Dirk Verbeuren's Kit on 'Dystopia' (Megadeth, 2016)",
  albumYear: 2016,
  band: 'Megadeth',
  genre: 'Thrash Metal',
  intro: 'Grammy Award for Best Metal Performance: Dirk Verbeuren\'s debut with Megadeth showcased...',
  // gear: DW Collector's Maple, Zildjian A Custom cymbals, DW 9002XF double pedals
  // key tracks: 'Dystopia', 'Fatal Illusion', 'Post American World'
  // recording notes: produced by Dave Mustaine + Dann Huff; Verbeuren recorded all drums in under 2 weeks
}
```

## File to touch

- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — append new entry

## Quality gate

- ≥400 words
- 3+ FAQ Q&A ("What drums does Dirk Verbeuren use?", "What won the Grammy for Best Metal Performance in 2016?", "Did Dirk Verbeuren record Dystopia?")
- Internal links: drummer profile + rust-in-peace-drum-setup (Megadeth cluster) + /drummer/lars-ulrich (genre comparison)
- MusicAlbum schema

## Verify

1. `grep 'dystopia-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — entry present
2. Visit https://metalforge.io/articles/dystopia-drum-setup — returns article page
3. `curl -s https://metalforge.io/api/meta?path=/articles/dystopia-drum-setup | jq '.title'` — keyword-matched title

## Done

- [x] Article entry in albumArticles.js (≥400 words, 3 FAQ, internal links, MusicAlbum schema)
title: SEO: Dirk Verbeuren — 'Dystopia' Megadeth drum setup article (Grammy-winning album, no editorial)
